prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic collage portrait of a joyful young Indian woman dancing barefoot in heavy rain on a wet city street at dreamy monsoon dusk. The central full-body image shows her wearing a flowing elegant white satin-and-lace midi dress with a fitted lace bodice, thin straps, lace hem, and soft wet fabric swirling outward as she spins. She holds a transparent clear umbrella with a white curved handle in one hand, her long wet dark brown hair flying naturally, with rain streaks, droplets, puddle splashes, glossy reflections, warm streetlamp bokeh, and shallow depth of field. Arrange the image as a cinematic editorial collage with exactly 5 visible image panels: 1 large central full-body dancing portrait, 1 large top-left close-up crop of her smiling face with glossy skin, expressive brown eyes, wet strands of hair, and umbrella edge crossing the frame, 1 small left-middle close-up of delicate hands near the dress strap and wet hair, 1 bottom-left close-up of ear, neck, pearl hoop earring, layered necklace, wet hair, and dress strap, and 1 bottom-right close-up of bare feet splashing in rainwater beneath the lace hem. Use soft natural makeup, rosy cheeks, bright smile, elegant feminine styling, realistic skin texture, water droplets on skin and umbrella, high-fashion monsoon romance mood, 85mm portrait lens look, cinematic color grading, warm amber lights against cool blue-gray rain. Add two large soft blurred rectangular privacy blocks in the collage, one covering the upper-right area and one covering part of the bottom-left neck panel, plus a smaller blurred rectangle over the face in the central full-body portrait, matching the muted beige-brown tones of the image. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted anatomy.
